name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: Next Debate -- be there, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423901:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r)
---
| | | | Peter, We just launched our latest contest -- it's another awesome, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, but you've only got a limited time to enter before we randomly choose the winner next week. We'll fly you AND a guest to Colorado, we've booked your hotel room, and we've saved two tickets for you and your friend. We're taking care of everything! All you have to do is enter:
---
| | [**Click Here To Enter By Making A $10 Donation** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423902:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r)
---
| Why are we running this contest? Two reasons:
1. It's our way of saying thank you for being a dedicated supporter and investing in our campaign.
2. Marco is always glad to have supporters in the audience during the debate, cheering him on and sharing in the experience.

[_**So click here to make a donation of $10 or more and you'll be automatically entered to win.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423902:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r) The deadline to enter is NEXT WEEK. Team Marco
---
| | [**Enter** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423902:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r)
---
| **Boulder Debate Contest Rules**
* Contest ends October 21, 2015.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* [You can also enter here without making a contribution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423903:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r)
* See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44423903:JMPEpbLNu:m:1:1349778030:C92E508C619DD9B074F168239C165E7B:r) To enter without making a contribution, click here. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on October 13, 2015 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on October 21, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on October 21, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Boulder, CO on October 28, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest . Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Prize not redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, Florida, 33255.
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: announcement re: upcoming presidential debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Now is our chance.

Despite the media covering this election as if it were a high school popularity contest, the upcoming debate gives my campaign a chance to break through.

You and I both watched the Washington Machine and their allies in the media enact a media blackout to try and stop my father's presidential campaign...

...And now they're doing the exact same thing to me.

That's why, today, I'm announcing a TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa to pepper the airwaves and reach as many voters as possible during and after the next Republican presidential debate.

I'm ready to fight in the next debate, Fellow Conservative. And my campaign staff has run the numbers and laid out a detailed plan to maximize this opportunity. We need to raise $200,000 before Tuesday, October 20th to make this work.

**[And I'm counting on you to please stand with me during this most critical time by making your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023521:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)**.

America is on the brink of even more turmoil if patriots like you don't stand up and fight to save it.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

I first ran for the U.S. Senate to take on this fight to restore our Constitution.

I'm running for President to take our country back.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises -- let alone point to a track record of delivering on the promises they make.

Whether it's foreign policy, government spying or just Big Government in general, it's all just pandering, hot air and half-truths.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

**[So please help me by chipping in your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023521:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)**.

We only have until October 20th to hit our $200,000 goal. This is the most critical moment of my campaign to date. So every dollar counts.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just what we need to break the media's stranglehold on my campaign.

But this plan can only be successful with your help.

With my deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please chip in a contribution IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023521:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)**?

This is our chance to fight back -- to end the media's false narrative against our movement.

We must break through, Fellow Conservative.

And it starts in Iowa.

Thank you in advance for your generous and continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023522:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023523:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023524:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023525:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023521:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023526:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023527:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31023528:WifZ9em2N:m:1:879035888:4907D65A96302A1D53DF895E257A1880:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWifZ9em2N). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWifZ9em2N)

[](http://www.paramountcommunication.com)**

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I want you at my birthday party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
My birthday is coming up. | Friend --

A birthday is a chance to really take stock of the people who matter most to you.

You matter to me, and I'd like you to be there when I blow out the candles at the end of the month.

**[Will you add your name right now for the chance to join me at my birthday party in New York?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There will be some familiar faces and even some special performances (I hear John Legend does a great rendition of "Happy Birthday"). And the campaign will cover your flights and accommodations.

**I would really like to see you there -- I hope you'll add your name:**
| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Hillary

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/14/15 and 10/18/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) or [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two (2) winners and a guest will receive one (1) invitation to attend Hillary’s Birthday Party, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,080). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM3NTE1NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDk2NzkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ben
body:
Peter, Over the next three weeks, we need to remind 30,000 Virginians to exercise their civic duty and vote. We can't do it alone.
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6618a22863768db1a472d00972d122fc0ea23d9c49e3a623ec98e0b267c7838b566f7e2f6bbec203)

---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

Can you imagine 30,000? Specifically, 30,000 Virginians?

Over the next three weeks, we need to remind 30,000 Commonwealth citizens to exercise their civic duty and vote. If they don't vote, it's not only their freedom that is wasted. It's the freedom of the men and women who fought for our country abroad against foreign enemies and at home for civil rights and good government.Americans for Prosperity has a focused, aggressive plan to connect with 30,000 Virginians and make sure they have all the resources to cast their vote. And it starts this Saturday.**October National Day of Action - Get Out the Vote!**_Urge Our Fellow Virginians to Exercise their Civic Duty_ **When: Saturday, October 17th** From 10 AM to 5 PM
**Where: Every Field Office - contact your field director to RSVP today!**
**Tidewater Region:** Jake Gunther ([jgunther@afphq.org](mailto:jgunther@afphq.org)) **Capitol Region:** James Marconi ([ jmarconi@afphq.org](mailto:jmarconi@afphq.org))
**Beltway Region:** Cody Holt ([cholt@afphq.org](mailto:cholt@afphq.org))
**Skyline Region: ** Flint Engleman ([fengleman@afphq.org](mailto:fengleman@afphq.org))

_First RSVP for each region will receive a new AFP coffee mug!_ Getting Out the Vote is how we ensure our voice is heard in Richmond and affect lasting change in our Commonwealth. Let's do our part to make sure our fellow citizens do theirs. Join us Saturday!Sincerely,Ben Knotts
VA Deputy State Director
Americans for ProsperityP.S. This Saturday is a great opportunity to bring a new friend and introduce them to AFP's work. Ask a friend, spouse, sibling, or coworker to join you for a few hours!
---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6618a22863768db1202371c0a5b860a88e1e4735e083c67ab9f5384489976d5800f94daf8b8dcab3 "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")
---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6618a22863768db12128739f593a249193ec284a554a8f34b648e9025bf45e2b35824b097e43be08) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 2111 Wilson Blvd, Ste. 350 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6618a22863768db137ccdcc185e420c1c68eeb8df8e14692dcb5c445fd7b5e5d4397ddaa8c4e5181) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6618a22863768db15debe4813960e72b8dc4c8deac4f8303f9fcfdc77ca86ece39208fe42b746061)******
---

name: Josh Wolf
subject: Happy Anniversary! (not so much)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

**Tomorrow marks two years since the madness of the first GOP Shutdown finally stopped.** The anniversary of the government shutdown is not a "happy" one, but we should remember it nonetheless -- especially since Republicans have us hurtling toward a similar fate at the beginning of December.

On October 16th 2013, after 16 days, 800,000 federal employees returned to work and government services finally resumed -- but not before our fragile economy was robbed of $24 billion.

Here's the most frustrating part. **If Republicans and the Tea Party get their way, the government will shut down again this December.**

In order to stop this cycle of Republican shutdown governing, Democrats need to win in 2016. **Patrick is our best hope to turn Florida blue.** [**We have a mid-month deadline at MIDNIGHT. We need to hit $3,000. Will you step up to stop this madness?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae217d/738133e4/3a4c7160/7f81df2c/1912304257/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151015?refcode=pme151015_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Last time Republicans shutdown the government, a number of Florida's Head Start programs were shuttered, the Kennedy Space Center only had nine workers on the job, and our National Parks and Wildlife Refuges were just plain closed.

The shutdown saga was a dismal chapter in history we can't afford to repeat. Families and communities in Florida and across the U.S. shouldn't have to fall on hard times because of the Tea Party's selfishness.

Two years ago on October 16th, we ended the shutdown -- let's not start another one.

[**Contribute $5 or $10 and support our fight to win back the Senate and stop this reckless shutdown cycle. The Tea Party needs to know we mean it.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae217d/738133e4/3a4c7160/7f81df2c/1912304257/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151015?refcode=pme151015_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Josh Wolf | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae217d/738133e4/3a4c7160/7f81df2d/1912304257/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae217d/738133e4/3a4c7160/7f81df2e/1912304257/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae217d/738133e4/3a4c7160/7f81df2f/1912304257/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
clean_body: | Friends, Tomorrow marks two years since the madness of the first GOP Shutdown finally stopped. The anniversary of the government shutdown is not a "happy" one, but we should remember it nonetheless -- especially since Republicans have us hurtling toward a similar fate at the beginning of December. On October 16th 2013, after 16 days, 800,000 federal employees returned to work and government services finally resumed -- but not before our fragile economy was robbed of $24 billion. Here's the most frustrating part. If Republicans and the Tea Party get their way, the government will shut down again this December. In order to stop this cycle of Republican shutdown governing, Democrats need to win in 2016. Patrick is our best hope to turn Florida blue. "" Last time Republicans shutdown the government, a number of Florida's Head Start programs were shuttered, the Kennedy Space Center only had nine workers on the job, and our National Parks and Wildlife Refuges were just plain closed. The shutdown saga was a dismal chapter in history we can't afford to repeat. Families and communities in Florida and across the U.S. shouldn't have to fall on hard times because of the Tea Party's selfishness. Two years ago on October 16th, we ended the shutdown -- let's not start another one. "" Thank you, Josh Wolf | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Our new Iowa HQ!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend -- **We’re expanding in Iowa!**

Just a few days ago, we moved into a brand new, 6,000 square foot office in Urbandale, IA to accommodate our growing field staff and volunteer team. We already have hundreds of people ready to hit the ground running, but we need a little extra help to cover the essentials like phones, stationary, and postage to name a few. Now that we have an office, these are the real costs we are thinking about.

**Every hour, one volunteer can reach 50 people promoting our conservative message of freedom, jobs, and prosperity -- all for less than $10.**

**[Can you chip in $10, $50, or $100 dollars to help us put the boots on the ground here in Iowa?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=1)

**Every little bit goes a long way in promoting our message and driving us to victory! God Bless, Rick[
](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=2)

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=3) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=5), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=6), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=7).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=iowa_office&n=8)
